mapper.sql: id, user_id, analysis_type, dimensions, report_content, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, competitiveness, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_analysis WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis (user_id, analysis_type, dimensions, report_content, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, competitiveness) VALUES (#{userId}, #{analysisType}, #{dimensions}, #{reportContent}, #{strengths}, #{weaknesses}, #{suggestions}, #{competitiveness})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_analysis WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
